title: Hotel Check-In
description: Check into your hotel room and ask about amenities.

t1.text: Good evening, welcome to the Grand Bayview. Are you checking in?

templates.text: Yes, I have a reservation under the name Lee.
templates.hint_zh: 是的,我用 Lee 這個名字訂了房。

t3.text: Let me find that. Could I see your passport, please?

t5.text: Thank you. I have you in a king deluxe room for three nights, is that right?

templates.text: That's correct. Would it be possible to get a room on a higher floor?
templates.hint_zh: 沒錯。可以幫我安排比較高樓層的房間嗎?

t7.text: Let me check. Yes, I can move you to the seventeenth floor with an ocean view.

templates.text: That sounds amazing, thank you. What time is breakfast?
templates.hint_zh: 聽起來太棒了,謝謝。早餐幾點開始?

t9.text: Breakfast runs from six thirty to ten on the second floor. The pool is on the rooftop.

templates.text: Great. Is there a gym I can use this evening?
templates.hint_zh: 好的。今天晚上可以使用健身房嗎?

t11.text: Yes, the gym is open twenty-four hours. Your room key opens it automatically.

templates.text: Perfect. One last thing - is the wifi free in the rooms?
templates.hint_zh: 太好了。最後一個問題--房間裡的網路是免費的嗎?

t13.text: Yes, the network name is on this card and the password is your room number.

templates.text: Thanks so much. Have a great night!
templates.hint_zh: 非常感謝,祝你今晚愉快!
